name: claude-token-tracker
description: Claude Token Tracker gives you instant visibility into your Claude Code usage without leaving VS Code. It reads session logs locally — no API key required — and shows token consumption by 5-hour block and weekly breakdown, estimated costs per model (Sonnet, Opus, Haiku), and a per-project summary. Stay on top of your limits before they catch you off guard.

claudeTracker.customClaudeDir.description: Custom path to the .claude directory (leave empty to use ~/.claude)

claudeTracker.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: Polling interval in seconds for usage data refresh

claudeTracker.showInStatusBar.description: Show token usage in the status bar

claudeTracker.oauthPollIntervalSeconds.description: Polling interval in seconds for OAuth usage data (minimum 120s to avoid rate limits)

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
